title: [Zul Logoth, Ruby Tunnel]
description: The smooth walls of the tunnel give way to a small cavern utilized as an entrance to the vast network of mining tunnels under the DragonSpine.  Carts ricochet past on a double-railed metal track, stopping occasionally for brief instances to pick up passengers.  Several dwarves busily work the area, ensuring the carts travel rapidly towards their destination.

wayto.1013:
;e fput "buy ticket"
waitfor "You hastily exit the cart"
